title: Extract Audio from Video: No Uploads, Just MP3
description:
Convert video to MP3 on your iPhone in seconds. No online uploads, no sketchy sites. Get your audio privately. #ExtractAudioApp #iOS #AudioExtraction
https://ExtractAudioApp.com/
topic:
App: Extract Audio from Video
Tagline: Convert video to MP3 on iPhone in seconds
Audience: iPhone users who want music, voice, or lecture audio from videos without uploading files to the web
Problem: Online converters are slow, sketchy, and upload your private videos — you just need an MP3 from a clip on your phone
Features: Video to MP3 on device (MP4, MOV); Share Sheet from Photos or Files; Trim before export; Private on-device processing; Free core extraction, optional in-app purchases
Platforms: iOS
Website (optional in CTA/caption): https://ExtractAudioApp.com/
Extra angle from user: extract audio from video
